card_description: Jim Pike is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 9 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies "Possession by God" (Dionysian mystery) as the secret core of Christianity, rediscovered by Meister Eckhart."
